description: Truffle Journal is a note-taking/journaling product for saving useful moments from AI conversations and retrieving them later. It pairs an iPhone app with a ChatGPT-connected workflow for saving, listing, and searching journal entries.
summary: Truffle Journal exposes a single documented integration surface: an OAuth-protected MCP server at https://mcp.trufflejournal.com/api/v1/mcp for ChatGPT app connectivity.
